data.name: 幸福的二人房
data.detailed_description:
💗幸福的二人房💗



我被綁架了
被認識多年以來的姐姐，綁架了……

遊戲劇情

怎麼樣的選擇才是正確的？
不論如何思考、如何抉擇，終究會走到絕望的一面。
但是她告訴了我——
就算選錯了道路也沒關係，只要竭盡全力讓它變成正確的就好了。

在夏季的尾聲，被生活壓得喘不過氣的我，再次與她相遇了。
我將這四年以來的苦水通通釋放了出來，甚至一度想離開這個世界……
而她，牽起我的手，帶著我邁向全新的生活。

遊戲要素

  • 擁有互動感的輕養成內容
  • 10萬字幸福且深入人心的故事
  • 複數結局路線
  • 女主角全日文配音
  • 全CG共33張，含差分變化共300張以上
  • 色色CG18張，且16張為動態CG，動態差分含變化共有700種以上

data.short_description: 夏季的尾聲到來，你被相識已久的姐姐綁架了。拋開過往所有的煩惱、壓力以及任何一切厭煩的事情，在這短短的數十天當中，與姐姐一同度過幸福的生活吧！
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 俄文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64bit OS
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • 處理器: Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS Sierra
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS Mojave 10.14.6
  • 處理器: Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

data.name: Happiness Double Room
data.detailed_description:
💗Happiness Double Room💗



I've been abducted.
Abducted by... the sister I've known for years.........

Story of the game

What's the right choice? No matter how I think about it, any decision I make will eventually bring me to my wit's end.
But she told me––
It's ok to have chosen the wrong path, as long as you try your best to make it right, everything will be fine.

Towards the end of summer, while I was feeling suffocated from all of life's pressures, I met her again.
I let out all the stress that I accumulated for 4 years, and even contemplated leaving this world at one point.....
However, she took my hand and guided me towards a new life.

Game Elements

  • It's an interactive simulation
  • An impactful 100,000-word story filled with happiness.
  • Multiple storyline endings
  • Japanese Voiced Female Lead
  • A total of 33 CG scenes and over 300 animated pictures
  • There are 18 erotic CG scenes in total, of which 16 scenes are animated, and over 700 animated pictures

data.short_description: It's the end of summer, and you've been abducted by a sister you've known for a long time. Forget all your past troubles, distress and everything bothersome, just spend your time happily with Sister in the days to come!
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Russian, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
